name: ernest-brain
principles: The VPS brain is the canonical memory and connector holder.
The local Claude Code/Cowork plugin calls a small stable MCP surface.
The brain may create drafts and reminder cards, but live sends remain approval-gated.
The local machine should not store Gmail/HubSpot/Slack tokens in VPS mode.

tools.name: health
tools.description: Return brain status, configured connectors, and read/write capability flags.

tools.name: search_memory
tools.description: Search canonical Ernest memory with scope and source references.

tools.name: write_memory
tools.description: Write approved internal memory updates. No permission escalation.

tools.name: list_watch_cards
tools.description: List recent reminder cards by window, concern, or card id.

tools.name: write_watch_card
tools.description: Write a reminder card. Remind-only content; no external draft bodies.

tools.name: search_mail
tools.description: Search connected mail for thread candidates. Follow with read_mail_thread for full bodies.

tools.name: read_mail_thread
tools.description: Read every message in an email thread by thread id. Returns full bodies and participants.

tools.name: create_mail_draft
tools.description: Create a mail draft or draft object for CEO approval. Never sends.

tools.name: search_hubspot
tools.description: Search HubSpot contacts, companies, deals, owners, and activities.

tools.name: search_slack
tools.description: Search Slack for channel/thread candidates. Follow with read_slack_thread for full messages.

tools.name: read_slack_thread
tools.description: Read every message in a Slack thread or DM by channel and thread ts.
